top.name: Lichdom
top.rules_text: Transform your wizard: gain 11 armor and Undying (if you would die instead consume all undead to heal to half HP). While in Lich form all your Necromancer spells cost 1 less.

channel.name: Lichdom (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also gain +2 to all damage dealt while in Lich form

bottom.name: Dominion of Death
bottom.rules_text: For 3 turns: all enemies that die anywhere on the board create corpses AND auto-raise as undead under your control.

channel.name: Dominion of Death (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Raised undead keep 50% of original stats
